title: Blog Post Title 1
summary: This is a short summary of the first blog post.
content:
Alright everyone, behold the first broken blog post of the website. Ignore the broken navigation buttons at the top, the fact I have no clue what the code is doing and I haven't written anything personal in about 5 years, everything should be working (I hope). I have wanted a website for years and the fact that I now have access to one is fantastic. Right now it is hosted on github and follows the domain grahamcoombs.github.io. I want to buy GrahamCoombs.ca, but right now I trying to buy government bonds, so who knows.


I am sitting in my EECS 1012 class which is focused on javascript trying to figure out javascript that chatgpt generated. Sometimes I wonder if I am making the right decision about running a website but then I think of pirate software (who I generally dislike) and his quote of “If you are looking for a reason not to do it, then just do it.


I also wanted to test word’s ability to convert it’s text into html, and so I am going to put in some pictures and see how it handles it.



Anyway’s let see how it works, and I will update the code/html as necessary to fix any problems.
